title: User cannot access intranet
description: User receives PingID prompt but mobile app is logged out
resolution_hint: Reset PingID enrolment and verify MFA registration

title: Mailbox nearly full
description: User reports Outlook warning that mailbox storage is almost full
resolution_hint: Review mailbox quota and archive policy

title: Suspicious login prompt
description: User reports unexpected MFA prompt from unknown location
resolution_hint: Review sign-in logs and revoke sessions if needed

title: New starter access request
description: Manager requests Microsoft 365 account and group access for new joiner
resolution_hint: Create account and assign standard onboarding groups

title: Laptop missing from Intune
description: Device no longer appears in Intune inventory
resolution_hint: Check device enrolment and sync status

title: Outlook not syncing
description: User reports Outlook desktop client has stopped receiving new mail
resolution_hint: Check Outlook profile cache and Exchange connectivity

title: SharePoint access request
description: User needs access to departmental SharePoint site
resolution_hint: Validate approval and add user to correct SharePoint group

title: Possible phishing email
description: User reports suspicious email asking for password reset
resolution_hint: Review message headers quarantine email and check affected users

title: Teams meeting room audio issue
description: Conference room microphone not working during Teams calls
resolution_hint: Check room device audio settings and Teams Rooms health

title: Password reset request
description: User forgot password and cannot access Microsoft 365
resolution_hint: Verify identity and complete password reset

title: VPN connection failing
description: Remote user cannot connect to VPN from home network
resolution_hint: Check VPN client logs user group membership and MFA status

title: Autopilot build failed
description: New laptop failed during Windows Autopilot enrolment
resolution_hint: Review Autopilot profile assignment and device hash

title: Unexpected admin consent prompt
description: User reports app requesting admin consent to access mailbox data
resolution_hint: Review enterprise app permissions and block if suspicious

title: Distribution list update
description: Manager requests new users added to department distribution list
resolution_hint: Validate approval and update distribution group membership

title: Printer queue stuck
description: Office printer has multiple stuck jobs and users cannot print
resolution_hint: Clear print queue restart spooler and test print

title: Account locked repeatedly
description: User account locks every morning after password change
resolution_hint: Check cached credentials mapped drives and mobile mail profile

title: Malware alert on endpoint
description: Defender reports malware detection on user laptop
resolution_hint: Isolate device review Defender alert and begin incident response

title: Request for Teams channel
description: Project lead requests private Teams channel for new initiative
resolution_hint: Create channel after approval and configure membership

title: Database report export failing
description: Operations report fails when exporting data to CSV
resolution_hint: Check application logs export job and database query timeout

title: API integration returning 500
description: Internal integration returns HTTP 500 during scheduled sync
resolution_hint: Check API logs recent deployments and failing payloads

title: User reports slow laptop
description: Laptop takes over 15 minutes to boot and open applications
resolution_hint: Check disk health startup apps and endpoint performance metrics

title: Finance app access issue
description: User can log in but receives permission error in finance system
resolution_hint: Check application role assignment and recent access changes

title: Unknown inbox rule found
description: User notices suspicious forwarding rule in mailbox
resolution_hint: Remove rule revoke sessions reset password and inspect sign-in logs

title: Request shared mailbox
description: Team requests shared mailbox for new project
resolution_hint: Create shared mailbox assign permissions and document owner

title: Wi-Fi dropping in meeting room
description: Users report unreliable Wi-Fi in one meeting room
resolution_hint: Check access point health channel interference and DHCP logs
